subject: A massive horned quadruped creature charging at full sprint, with a leonine mane at the shoulders, large curved horns, a reptilian-scaled body, and a cosmically-patterned torso marked with deep purple and blue stellar sparkles
description: A large quadruped creature dominates the frame in a low-angle action shot that emphasizes its charging momentum. The front of the creature — chest, shoulders, and neck — is densely textured with what appears to be a thick leonine mane in golden-brown tones. Its face carries two large curving horns and a snarling open-mouthed expression with visible teeth. The torso transitions into a reptilian or draconic scaled body, and strikingly, a broad swath of the chest and underbelly is rendered in deep purple-violet with scattered blue stellar sparkles — the signature Theros constellation-creature aesthetic marking this as a divine or mythically significant animal. The creature runs across a rocky scrubland terrain under an open blue sky with white clouds; debris kicks up at its hooves. Forest and cliff formations frame the sides. The overall impression is of an unstoppable natural force, consistent with a creature bearing the authority of a hunt-god's blessing.
foreground: Charging horned beast with cosmic constellation markings on its torso, debris at feet
background: Rocky scrubland with cliff formations, open sky with white clouds
emotion: Aggressive forward momentum; wide open jaw and lowered head communicate unstoppable charge rather than controlled motion
